summary: 18 tests passed, 89.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: process_document() extracts text from standard PDFs
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented process_document() with standard mode that uses Docling DocumentConverter to extract page-level text. Tests TestStandardModeExtraction verify extraction of 2-page documents with correct text content and default mode='standard'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: process_document() extracts text from scanned PDFs using VLM mode
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _build_converter() that configures Docling with PipelineOptions for VLM mode when mode='vlm'. Test TestVLMModeExtraction verifies VLM extraction produces pages with text and sets mode='vlm' on result.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns ExtractedDocument with page-level text and page numbers
completion_promises.evidence: Defined ExtractedPage and ExtractedDocument dataclasses. process_document() returns ExtractedDocument with source_file, pages list of ExtractedPage (each with page_number and text), and mode. Tests TestExtractedDocumentStructure verify type, source_file, sequential page numbers, and dataclass nature.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Raises DoclingError on processing failure (not generic Exception)
completion_promises.evidence: process_document() catches all non-DoclingError exceptions from converter.convert() and wraps them in DoclingError with source file context. Tests TestDoclingErrorOnFailure verify DoclingError is raised on RuntimeError/ValueError, includes file path in message, and is catchable as IngestionError.

process_document() checks path.exists() before processing and raises FileNotFoundError with the file path in the message. Tests TestFileNotFoundError verify the exception is raised and includes the filename.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Zero-byte files raise DoclingError with descriptive message
completion_promises.evidence: process_document() checks path.stat().st_size == 0 and raises DoclingError with message 'Cannot process zero-byte file: {path} (0 bytes)'. Tests TestZeroByteFile verify DoclingError is raised and message matches pattern '(zero.byte|empty|0 bytes)'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty extraction result (image-only PDF in standard mode) returns ExtractedDocument with empty pages list
completion_promises.evidence: When Docling returns empty pages dict, process_document() returns ExtractedDocument with pages=[] while preserving source_file and mode. Tests TestEmptyExtraction verify empty pages list and correct metadata.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Docling is lazy-imported (not at module level)
completion_promises.evidence: Docling imports are inside _get_document_converter() and _build_converter() functions only. No top-level 'import docling' or 'from docling' statements. Tests TestLazyImport verify: (1) importing docling_processor does not add 'docling' to sys.modules, (2) source code has no top-level docling imports.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both ingestion/docling_processor.py and ingestion/tests/test_docling_processor.py pass 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' with zero errors. Verified after implementation and formatting.
